clue:
I keep things cold, I hum all day,
open my door to find your way.
hint: Look for something that keeps your food fresh!
celebration: Brr! You found the fridge — great start, explorer! 🥶

clue:
I have four legs but never walk,
you sit on me to rest and talk.
hint: It's something soft you love to relax on.

clue:
I have roots but never grow,
I have a trunk with no suitcase though.
hint: Go outside and look for something tall and leafy!
celebration: You really went out on a limb for that one! 🌳
